## Acceptance Criteria
What must be implemented for this task to be complete?
 
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3
---
 
## Responsive Design
Address responsive design requirements:
 
- [ ] Works on mobile (< 768px)
- [ ] Works on tablet (768px - 1024px)
- [ ] Works on desktop (> 1024px)
---
 
## Accessibility (WCAG 2.1)
Consider accessibility requirements:
 
- [ ] Keyboard navigation implemented
- [ ] ARIA labels and roles appropriate
- [ ] Color contrast meets WCAG AA standards
- [ ] Screen reader compatible
- [ ] Focus indicators visible
---
 
## Definition of Done
A frontend/UI task is done when **all** of the following are satisfied:
 
- [ ] Component/page is implemented according to design
- [ ] Code follows the project's style guide and conventions
- [ ] Component is responsive and works on all required screen sizes
- [ ] Accessibility requirements are met (WCAG 2.1 AA)
- [ ] Component is tested with unit tests (aim for >80% coverage)
- [ ] Component integrates properly with parent/child components
- [ ] No console errors or warnings
- [ ] State management is properly implemented
- [ ] Props are properly typed (TypeScript if applicable)
- [ ] Styling is consistent with design system
- [ ] Component is tested manually in multiple browsers
- [ ] Code review is complete and approved
- [ ] Branch is merged to `main`
---
 
## Browser Compatibility
List which browsers need to be supported:
 
- [ ] Chrome (latest)
- [ ] Firefox (latest)
- [ ] Safari (latest)
- [ ] Edge (latest)
- [ ] Mobile browsers (specify): ________
